originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Merging Dev Branches and Debugging Broadcast Issue in PufferLib
summary: Merged a dev branch with advanced features and a J-hacking branch, then debugged a performance regression caused by a PyTorch broadcasting error. Fixed the bug, integrated Muon optimizer and cosine annealing, and launched hyperparameter sweeps on Breakout.
